name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Border at ‘breaking point,’ New York Times reports
body:
Two and a half weeks after President Donald J. Trump declared a National Emergency to address the crisis on our border... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c46586c861&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • March 5, 2019
---
| | |
# **Border at ‘breaking point,’ _New York Times_ reports**

**Two and a half weeks** after President Donald J. Trump declared a National Emergency to address the crisis on our border, mainstream media outlets have dug into the numbers—and the personal stories—surrounding America’s broken immigration system.

**What they’ve found** comes as a shock to many Americans who never knew the trauma felt by those living in the shadows—including both U.S. citizens and migrants alike:
* “More than 76,000 migrants crossed the border without authorization in February, more than double the levels from the same period last year and approaching the largest numbers seen in any February in the last 12 years,” _The New York Times_ reported today.

* On Sunday, _The New York Times_ published [firsthand accounts](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=37dee005fa&e=3ee4985eea) of “the hidden nightmare of sexual violence on the border,” citing President Trump’s quote that “one in three women are sexually assaulted on the dangerous trek up through Mexico.”

* On February 15, after President Trump’s border announcement, [CNN’s Jim Acosta spoke with an “angel mom”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=764015ea19&e=3ee4985eea) immigrant whose only son was murdered by a previously deported criminal alien. “President Trump is completely correct on this issue—we need to protect this country,” she told CNN.

**This morning,** the Department of Homeland Security released staggering numbers that put these stories in context. American law enforcement officers are apprehending more than 2,000 aliens _every day_ at our Southern border. All told, U.S. Border Patrol has apprehended over 268,000 individuals since the beginning of this fiscal year in October—a 97 percent increase from the previous year.

**Democrat leaders** are holding firm. “There is no crisis at the border,” the Democrat House Majority Leader insisted a little more than a week ago. To their credit, however, more journalists are starting to simply tell the stories of what’s happening on our border—and letting Americans decide for themselves what they think about it.

**These reports are welcome.** The ongoing humanitarian and security disaster at our border shouldn’t be a partisan issue, and the heart-wrenching stories it causes shouldn’t be told only by conservative media. A modern, safe, and secure immigration system would be a bipartisan triumph that renews Americans’ faith in Washington.

**The only thing** standing in our way is the political will.

[Our country is facing a growing emergency at the border.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4eaa056b20&e=3ee4985eea)

**Watch** : [Congressman and Air Force Reservist says yes, a wall would help!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=94cb24ac3f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **It is time to end this national tragedy**

**This afternoon, President Trump** confronted a solemn crisis by signing an executive order to help end the national tragedy of veteran suicide.

**The numbers are hard to believe**. Each day, an average of 20 service members and veterans die by suicide. In 2016, the suicide rate among veterans was one and a half times higher than it was for other American adults, a toll that has taken far too many of our heroes.

**Given the scale of the problem,** the Federal Government must work with partners across all levels of the public, private, and non-profit sectors. To accomplish that, President Trump announced today that his Administration will develop a public health roadmap to cultivate outreach with every single American veteran—replacing a passive system wherein the onus for engagement is placed on veterans themselves.

**“To every veteran** : I want you to know that you have an entire nation of more than 300 million people behind you,” the President said from the White House today. “You will never, ever be forgotten. We are with you all the way. I think you know that.”

[President Trump’s call to action: It is time to end veteran suicide.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eb795a6c7d&e=3ee4985eea)

**Watch** : [President Trump announces his executive order](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=615e25041d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
| **President Donald J. Trump signs an executive order to help end veteran suicide **| March 5, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fe77eb93d2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=87ccf800e5&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=cb96e45206)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

subject: Next Week: President Trump Behind the Scenes
body:
It's almost here. You've seen emails about this for weeks, and NOW is the time to act. Next Monday is your chance to hear directly from two senior... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/next-week-president-trump-behind-the-scenes?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|

Indiana Republicans -

It's almost here. You've seen emails about this for weeks, and NOW is the time to act. Next Monday is your chance to hear directly from two senior members of the Trump campaign right here in Indiana!

Secure your tickets **NOW** for the [2019 Indiana Republican Party Spring Dinner](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=77819978c9&e=1acd9bb3d6) next Monday, and you will:
* Be in the room for a _**one-of-a-kind conversation**_ with the former campaign manager of the Donald J. Trump for President campaign, Corey Lewandowski, the former deputy campaign manager, David Bossie, and the senior political advisor to Vice President Mike Pence, Marty Obst

* _**H****ear** behind-the-scenes stories about President Donald J. Trump_ from the campaign trail, and stories about how he's making America great again

* _**Enjoy a formal dinner**_ with your fellow Republicans from across the state

With the dinner just five days away, registration is closing soon. I want to make sure you don't miss your chance to be part of this unique event!
Get your tickets NOW by booking here:
[Purchase as an Individual](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7d485088e1&e=1acd9bb3d6)
[Purchase as a Corporation/Organization](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ab591d8482&e=1acd9bb3d6)

I've included an invitation for you below. If you have any questions, please contact Zach Willis at [zwillis@indiana.gop](mailto:zwillis@indiana.gop?subject=2019%20Spring%20Dinner) ASAP, and he'll help you reserve your spot. See you there,
Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

P.S. This unique event celebrating President Trump is on Monday, and registration is closing soon. **[_Secure your tickets ASAP_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0234d210eb&e=1acd9bb3d6) so that you don't risk missing out! **

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Yeah, This Looks Like a Border Crisis
body:
"So much for all those media ‘fact checks’ arguing that there’s no emergency to justify President Trump’s wall." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7352533fb9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Yeah, This Looks Like a Border Crisis**

“More than 76,000 migrants crossed the southern border illegally last month, the highest number in 12 years. So much for all those media ‘fact checks’ arguing that there’s no emergency to justify President Trump’s wall,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes.

“Why are they coming in such vast numbers? Because smugglers have put them wise to how to take advantage of recent court decisions to claim asylum and remain here indefinitely.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e144783fa5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The nation’s top manufacturers have for the ninth consecutive quarter given the Trump economy a thumbs up, setting record industry optimism of the economy and predicting positive growth unseen during the Obama administration,” Paul Bedard reports for the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d080833666&e=3ee4985eea)_. “The past nine quarters . . . have seen record optimism, with an average of 91.8 percent of manufacturers positive about their own firm, compared to an average of 68.6 percent during the last two years of the Obama administration.”
---
|
---
| “U.S. employers need to enhance the skills of their current and future workers for the economy to remain on its robust growth trajectory, said Ivanka Trump, ahead of a meeting Wednesday with prominent business executives, educators and governors,” Eric Morath writes in _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=98dad7f266&e=3ee4985eea)_. Ms. Trump will convene the first meeting of the American Workforce Policy Advisory Board this afternoon.
---
|
---
| “Over the past several years, technological advancements like electronic health records (EHRs), cloud computing, and connected smart devices have made the long-held vision of improving patients’ access to their medical records a genuine possibility,” Senior Adviser to the President Jared Kushner, White House Deputy Chief of Staff Chris Liddell, and CMS Administrator Seema Verma write in _[Fortune](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=74e3ee1c86&e=3ee4985eea)_. “A new rule issued by President Donald Trump’s administration will help turn this vision into reality.”
---
|
---
| “First lady Melania Trump is challenging journalists to cover the opioid crisis as often as they publish ‘idle gossip and trivial stories.’ She made the request while speaking in Las Vegas Tuesday at an event with conservative commentator Eric Bolling, whose 19-year-old son died from an overdose in 2017,” Caitlin Yilek reports in the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=03ac21c9fd&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6d3dd6490a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cb63521967&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=f7abaec00a)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

So much for all those media ‘fact checks’ arguing that there’s no emergency to justify President Trump’s wall,” the New York Post editorial board writes. “Why are they coming in such vast numbers? name: Jason Yates
subject: VIDEO: How does our faith apply to government?
body:
| | Peter, Why are pastors in America afraid to speak about political issues in our nation? And, as Christians, how can we be bold with our faith to effect change in our culture? In a recent interview with My Faith Votes, Dr. Jim Garlow, Founder and CEO of _Well Versed_ , answers these questions and many more. Dr. Garlow has traveled the world imparting to global leaders the powerful truth that God’s Word provides instructions for every area of life, including government. And he provides some great takeaways for us to bring biblical change to our spheres of influence. _“God wrote a book that affects us not only in regards to our personal life, our family life, our church life, but affects us in our national and community life. And if we would follow scripture and governance principles, we could reduce human suffering, human pain, and poverty.”_
–Dr. Jim Garlow Please watch my conversation with Dr. Jim Garlow below. I pray it will bring encouragement and inspiration to you! [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k1B9A9_Qgqf0ayzc28rnj2A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190306com01&n=1) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k1B9A9_Qgqf0ayzc28rnj2A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190306com01&n=2) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190306com01&n=3)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190306com01&n=4).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190306com01&n=5) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190306com01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190306com01&n=7)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: would love your input, please
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,

My friend Senator Tina Smith just won a hard-fought special election last year in Minnesota -- and now she's turning around and running for re-election in 2020. It's an uphill challenge -- Tina is the only Senate Democrat in 2020 who has to fend off back-to-back attempts by GOP leaders to defeat her.

NBC News has already it labeled a "race to watch," and Roll Call is calling her race competitive. The truth is, if Tina doesn't win this seat, Democrats have no shot at taking back the Senate majority.

That's why I'm asking you right now to please chip in $3 or whatever you can to support Tina's campaign. Her first public filing deadline of 2019 is quickly approaching, and if she falls short, the GOP will have an early advantage that will be hard to make up:

http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190306_Survey1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto

Tina is one of the hardest workers in Washington. She's fought tirelessly to address the skyrocketing cost of prescription drugs. She's the only U.S. Senator to have worked for Planned Parenthood and she is a steadfast advocate for reproductive rights. And she's leading the charge in fighting for federal contract workers to receive back pay following Trump's government shutdown.

But if Donald Trump and GOP leaders have their way, they'll replace Tina with a far-right extremist next year. Trump lost Minnesota by only 1.5 points in 2016, and he's already named Minnesota one of the Republicans' top targets to win in 2020.

Tina Smith's race in Minnesota is a must-win in the battle for control of the Senate. But with Trump targeting Minnesota for victory, we need to make sure Tina is ready for all the big donors, dark money, and right-wing attacks the GOP will try against her.

Can I count on you to donate $3 or whatever you can right now to help Tina win this race? Every dollar you give right now helps turn the Senate blue next year:

http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190306_Survey1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto

With every good wish,

Maggie Hassan

http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190306_Survey1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto

--

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

Her first public filing deadline of 2019 is quickly approaching, and if she falls short, the GOP will have an early advantage that will be hard to make up: Tina is one of the hardest workers in Washington. She's fought tirelessly to address the skyrocketing cost of prescription drugs. She's the only U.S. Senator to have worked for Planned Parenthood and she is a steadfast advocate for reproductive rights. And she's leading the charge in fighting for federal contract workers to receive back pay following Trump's government shutdown. But if Donald Trump and GOP leaders have their way, they'll replace Tina with a far-right extremist next year. Trump lost Minnesota by only 1.5 points in 2016, and he's already named Minnesota one of the Republicans' top targets to win in 2020. Tina Smith's race in Minnesota is a must-win in the battle for control of the Senate. But with Trump targeting Minnesota for victory, we need to make sure Tina is ready for all the big donors, dark money, and right-wing attacks the GOP will try against her. Can I count on you to donate $3 or whatever you can right now to help Tina win this race? Every dollar you give right now helps turn the Senate blue next year: With every good wish, Maggie Hassan --

name: Lauren Groh-Wargo
subject: BREAKING: House Panel Will Investigate Kemp
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
Our elections system is unconstitutional and in dire need of reform. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa6aa/34a064cc/77d8224/703a6d1/3959067549/VEsH/ "https://www.fairfightgeorgia.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=IE030619HOUSE&source=IE030619HOUSE")

| | | Friend, Long lines. Broken machines. Vanishing registrations. That's what Georgia voters got in 2018. Since then, Fair Fight has committed to fighting back, calling on our fellow Georgians to join us in pursuing a fair and equitable system that operates effectively, efficiently, and equally. Together, our refusal to be silent and commitment to fight back elevated the voting issues Georgians experienced to the national stage. Today, Rep. Elijah E. Cummings, the Chairman of the Committee on Oversight and Reform, and Rep. Jamie Raskin, the Chairman of the Subcommittee on Civil Rights and Civil Liberties, officially requested documents from Governor* Brian Kemp and Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger relating to reports of voting issues in Georgia. [**To deliver real solutions for Georgia voters and defend the right to vote each and every day, we need you with us.**](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa6aa/34a064cc/77d8224/703a6de/3959067549/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfightga2018-2?refcode=IE030619HOUSE&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=2+-+To+deliver+real+solutions+for+Georgia+vo&utm_campaign=IE030619HOUSE&source=IE030619HOUSE")**[Can you chip in today to ensure that voters in Georgia get a fair fight?](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa6aa/34a064cc/77d8224/703a6df/3959067549/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfightga2018-2?refcode=IE030619HOUSE&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=3+-+Can+you+chip+in+today+to+ensure+that+vot&utm_campaign=IE030619HOUSE&source=IE030619HOUSE")** We are glad to see our leaders recognizing the magnitude of problems Georgians faced in 2018 due to the Secretary of State's malfeasance, as well as the state's continued refusal to guarantee the right to implement meaningful reforms in the 2019 legislative session. And we're grateful for the work of legislators fighting back against bad proposals that could affect our elections for years to come. I'll be clear: this fight is far from over. Our elections system is unconstitutional and in dire need of reform. Georgians, particularly Georgians of color, faced too many hurdles trying to make their voices heard. They were turned away without being given a provisional ballot, or they stood in line for hours to vote only to be falsely told they were in the wrong polling location, or their absentee ballot was rejected without notice. And voters across the state continue to face issues in special elections this year. [**We must leverage every resource to unearth the root causes of these problems and find solutions to ensure all citizens can exercise their fundamental right to vote.**](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa6aa/34a064cc/77d8224/703a6dc/3959067549/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfightga2018-2?refcode=IE030619HOUSE&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=4+-+We+must+leverage+every+resource+to+unear&utm_campaign=IE030619HOUSE&source=IE030619HOUSE")**[Contribute today to help us reform our elections system and pursue fair elections for all.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa6aa/34a064cc/77d8224/703a6dd/3959067549/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfightga2018-2?refcode=IE030619HOUSE&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=5+-+Contribute+today+to+help+us+reform+our+e&utm_campaign=IE030619HOUSE&source=IE030619HOUSE")** Thank you for helping us fight back,
Lauren
